title: BankBazaar Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: BankBazaar Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
